title: Poppy Smokey
description: A romantic Syrian dish featuring ground poppy seeds that are crispy and smoky when grilled, a low-fat-friendly option.
instructions: Preheat your grill to medium-high heat (around 350°F).
Mix the ground poppy seeds with olive oil, minced garlic, onion, thyme leaves, and pomegranate molasses. Season with salt and pepper.
Lightly toast pine nuts in a dry skillet until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes.
Spread the seed mixture evenly on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Grill for 10-15 minutes, or until crispy and fragrant. Keep an eye on it to prevent burning.
Sprinkle toasted pine nuts over the popped poppy seeds before serving.
